title: WECode – Competitive Coding Platform
description: A fully-featured competitive coding platform with 100+ problems, multi-language code execution, real-time test-case feedback, an AI-powered hint assistant, and a monetized video solution system with role-based access control.

title: NiteBite – Real-Time Food Ordering Platform
description: A real-time food ordering platform for a college night canteen. Students place orders, canteen workers confirm and track preparation — all synchronized live across dashboards. Tested with 150+ simultaneous users with zero failures.

title: Fake News Detection – ML/NLP Web App
description: A full-stack NLP application with a Logistic Regression model achieving 98.94% accuracy on 9,000+ samples. Features TF-IDF vectorization, confidence scores, prediction history, and comparative model metrics.

title: GoChat – Real-Time Chat Web Application
description: A real-time messaging application with low-latency one-to-one communication, secure authentication and session management for registered users, media sharing, presence tracking, and scalable backend APIs with efficient message storage and retrieval.

title: DSA Visualizer
description: An interactive platform to visualize various Data Structures and Algorithms with smooth animations and concise explanations, featuring secure user authentication with login/logout and a responsive, visually appealing frontend for a seamless cross-device experience.
